source_refs.excerpt: Weight kg/m A B C - E
For low pressure hoselines, please refer to SN 544
2) For solderless pipe couplings with cutting ring, please refer to SN 456.
3) For male studs and weld-on sockets, please refer to SN 759.
4) For SAE flanges, please refer to SN 532.
